evidence_quotes.quote: I wish companies would be required to have an end of life plan for their games
We paid for it, we want to keep using it.
not simply "kill" these gems but rather enables us to continue enjoying them on our own terms.

paragraphs.text: Dear Commission, I am writing to you to emphasize the need for an addition to this act that protects digital media, mainly games, purchased by us, europeans. I wish companies would be required to have an end of life plan for their games, i.e. share the server software, open source it, make an offline mode or any other solution already mentioned. Games are art and many of us have a deep emotional attachment to our favorite art pieces. We paid for it, we want to keep using it. We cannot expect game companies to keep hosting unprofitable games, but we can expect them to not simply "kill" these gems but rather enables us to continue enjoying them on our own terms.
